item.description:
What's New in v1.2.6:

Audio & Video Conferencing
• Full group conference support with grid, speaker, and filmstrip views
• Live reactions and gesture recognition during calls
• Host controls: mute all, lock meeting, waiting room
• Screen sharing with participant indicators
• Bandwidth-adaptive video quality and grid subscription management

Chat Stability & UX
• Fixed crash when switching conversations rapidly
• Fixed double-loading issue on conversation selection
• Fixed avatar colors inconsistent between chat list and detail view
• Enhanced image paste support (clipboard and file drops now work reliably)
• Sidebar alignment improvements — consistent padding across modules

New Features
• Update your online status in Cliq directly from the sidebar
• Presence status menu now accessible from sidebar
• Improved attachment preview handling
• Mail sidebar refinements

What's New in v1.2.5:

Audio & Video Calls
• 1-on-1 audio and video calling with full WebRTC support
• Group conference calls with multi-participant layout
• Call controls: mute, camera toggle, screen share, speaker selection
• Incoming call notifications with accept/decline

Custom App Icon
• Telegram-style icon switcher — choose from 4 icon variants
• Custom icon appears everywhere: Dock, Finder, Spotlight, Launchpad
• Persists across restarts; auto-restores after updates

Chat Improvements
• Improved message bubble rendering and layout
• Optimized chat list scroll performance (6 fixes)

Bug Fixes
• Fixed several stability and performance issues
• Improved memory usage in chat module

What's New in v1.2.4:

Chat Module (Beta)
• Full chat experience with direct messages, group chats, and channels
• @Mentions — see who mentioned you with unread indicators in the sidebar
• Starred Messages — star messages with 5 categories (Important, To-do, Note, Manager, Follow-up)
• Click any mention or starred message to jump directly to it with a highlight animation
• Pinned chats shown in a dedicated sidebar section
• Real-time messaging via WebSocket (PEX)
• Unread filter toggle in the toolbar

Bug Fixes
• Fixed @mentions API parsing — mentions now load correctly
• Fixed starred messages not showing all star types
• Fixed mark-as-unread using wrong HTTP method (POST→PUT)
• Fixed pagination spinner with unread filter active
• Pinned chats no longer duplicated in the main chat list

• Fixed crash caused by CoreData merge conflicts during background mail prefetch
  • Fixed app not loading data on relaunch (account loading race condition)
  • Fixed contact suggestions sorting by relevance instead of alphabetical
  • Fixed Settings button in account dropdown menu
• Fixed duplicate draft saves — drafts now save only on manual save (⌘S) or window close

• Removed duplicate onboarding screen — login now goes directly to the sign-in page
  • DMG now includes Applications shortcut for easy drag-to-install
